The '''Highland Green Washeteria''' was a laundromat-c<!--Look it up: "An English linking word, derived from the Latin word for 'with.'"-->um-eatery on the north side of [[Pelek Baw/Legends|Pelek Baw]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal]]. It was a cover for [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]]; its owner, [[Phloremirlla Tenk]], and five of its 37 employees, were undercover Intelligence agents.

It was made from white tiles with black grout. Possible modifications included [[Durasteel/Legends|durasteel]] blast shutters. During the [[Battle of Pelek Baw]], the [[Balawai]] militia used it as a headquarters.

==Appearances==
